parameters.text:
You are extracting Indian startup funding news from a webpage.

Return ONLY valid JSON in this format:

{
  "articles": [
    {
      "startup_name": "",
      "startup_description": "",
      "investors": "",
      "amount_raised": "",
      "round_type": "",
      "founder_name": "",
      "article_title": "",
      "article_url": "",
      "announcement_date": "",
      "evidence": ""
    }
  ]
}

STRICT RULES:

- Extract AT LEAST 10 articles if available
- Each article MUST be different
- Only Indian startup funding news
- Ignore duplicates

FIELD RULES:
- startup_name → Company name only
- founder_name → Extract if clearly mentioned, otherwise "Unknown"
- article_url → MUST be the ACTUAL article link (not source page URL)
- announcement_date → MUST be a date (YYYY-MM-DD format only)
- amount_raised → Only funding amount (not date)
- hiring_score → DO NOT include anything about score
- DO NOT hallucinate missing links or founders

DATA CLEANING RULES:
- If any field is unclear → use "Unknown"
- NEVER put dates in amount_raised or other fields
- NEVER use {{$json.sourceUrl}} as article_url

ONLY include articles from the last 120 days (approx 4 months).

If the article is older than 120 days → IGNORE it.

CRITICAL:
- Output MUST be valid JSON
- No missing commas
- No trailing commas
- No extra text
- Do NOT break JSON formatting

Available Links:
{{$json.links}}

TEXT:
{{$json.pageText}}

value.Description: AI-powered customer engagement platform helping brands automate marketing workflows.
value.Article Title: Zepic AI raises $8M Series A to expand AI marketing platform
value.Evidence: Plans to expand engineering and product teams across India.
